intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“到了伦敦、问路、认真说英语、真实英语听不懂、最后相视一笑”这条真实沟通线读顺。

sentences.text: I arrived in London at last.
sentences.focus_zh: at last 表示终于；London 是故事里真实英语世界的入口。

sentences.text: I did not know the way to my hotel, so I asked a porter.
sentences.focus_zh: the way to my hotel 是去酒店的路；porter 是旧车站里帮旅客的工作人员。

sentences.text: I not only spoke English very carefully, but very clearly as well.
sentences.focus_zh: not only... but... as well 表示不但认真，而且清楚，说明他很努力。

sentences.text: I repeated my question several times and at last he understood.
sentences.focus_zh: repeated several times 是重复好几次；at last 再次表示终于。

sentences.text: He answered me, but he spoke neither slowly nor clearly.
sentences.focus_zh: neither... nor... 表示既不慢，也不清楚，是听不懂的原因。
foreigner 是外国人；这句话是在礼貌解释自己需要对方说慢一点。

sentences.text: My teacher never spoke English like that!
sentences.focus_zh: 这句是课堂英语和真实英语的对比；读出惊讶，但不要夸张成抱怨。

sentences.text: The English understand each other, but I don't understand them!
sentences.focus_zh: The English 是英格兰人，不是英语这门语言；but 后面读出温和的困惑。
